title: tilia platyphyllos var. rubra
intro: Tilia platyphyllos var. rubra, also known as the large-leaved lime or red-leaved lime, is a variety of the Tilia platyphyllos tree, native to Europe. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Tilia platyphyllos var. rubra include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support respiratory health and promote relaxation.
